body.title: Test Treasury Withdrawal
body.abstract: Testnet lifecycle validation for governance action submission workflow.
body.motivation: Validating the end-to-end process of creating, submitting, and verifying a treasury withdrawal governance action on the Cardano preview testnet.
body.rationale: This is a test proposal to exercise CIP-108 metadata generation, blake2b-256 hashing, governance action creation, transaction building, signing, and submission. No real funds are requested.
